free_text: Systematics of (p,d) analyzing powers at 94 MeV.
The targets were isotopically enriched,self-supporting
foils of nomunal thicknesses 3.3, 4.0 and 3.2 mg/cm**2,
respectively.
Indiana University Cyclotron Facility
A position-sensitive helical proportional
counter followed by two plastic scintillators. Energy
loss delta e signals from two scintillators were used
for particle identification.
Distorted-wave born approximation.
*EN-RSL-FW* energy resolution of the beam - FWHM.
* by Authors * spectra were taken over the angular
range from 6 degree to 20 degree in 2 degree steps,
from 20 degree to 30 degree in 2.5 degree steps, and
from 30 degree to 45 degree in 3 degree steps.
*by Compiler* data points on the figures do not
consistent with authors comment time by time.
INC-SPECT is included. Transform to lower
case.
Last checking has been done.
